title: TNT Wand
description: This mod adds a TNT wand (currently only accessable through creative and commands) that throws tnt wherever you wish when right clicking!
body: This mod adds a TNT Wand (obtainable through creative menu and /give) where you can throw tnt by right-clicking with the TNT Wand in hand! this mod is very simple and was made for fun as i was bored (w dad)
